roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:AMENDMENT TO RESTITUTION ORDERS TO INCLUDE 3 CO-DEFENDANTS/NP/CTORD:RESTITUTION ORDER OF 04-28-21, AMENDED/X:PARTIES STIPULATE TO RESTITUION ASFOLLOWS:/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF 1,500 TOVIDEOFAX PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE/CTORD:CO-DEFENDANTS SINCERE GREEN(#20006403), MALJANAE WILLIAMS (#20006404), AND  EARLASHA JORDAN (20006413)ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR VICTIM  RESTITUTION AS ORDERED/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/CCU/CONTPROB/

/CAL: RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,525,96 TO VIDEOFAX JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY WIHT CO-DEFENDANTSSINCERE GREEN CASE NUMBER 20006403 AND MALJANAE WILLIAMS CASE 20006404, PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/X:CR-115 IS SUBMITTED BY THE DEFENDANT,/CCU/CONTPROB/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:EAN VIZZI/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:07-16-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/WEAP/WS/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD:DEFENDANTNOT TO CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL, MARIJUANA OR REGULATED AND OR CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE WITHOUT A PRESCRIPTION FOR SAME/CTORD:DEFENDANT CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES OF SHERIFF'S ELECTRIC MONITORING OFFICE WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL OF THE COURT/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA4:VIDEO FAX AT 1750 CESAR CHAVEZ IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD/TE:4 HOURS/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARYHEARING IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOP/
